name: Pezuela de las Torres — circular desde Nuevo Baztán
region_intro: Mountain bike trails around Nuevo Baztán traverse a diverse landscape characterized by valleys, streams, and extensive Mediterranean flora. The region features areas of holm oaks, gall oaks, olive groves, and almond trees, providing varied terrain for exploration. Key natural features include the Valle del Tajuña and Arroyo Vega, which offer numerous paths and trails. This environment creates engaging challenges and enjoyable rides for different skill levels. Best mountain bike trails around Nuevo Baztán The most popular mountain bike trail is Pezuela de las Torres — circular desde Nuevo Baztán, a 22.0 miles (35.46 km) trail that takes 3 hours 8 minutes to complete, winding through diverse Mediterranean flora and offering varied terrain. Another top favourite among local mountain bikers is Church of Torres de la Alameda – La Oliva fountain loop from Eurovillas-Las Villas, a moderate 24.3 miles (39.04 km) path, exploring the Tajuña Valley with views of holm oaks and olive groves. Local mountain bikers also love the Negrín Railway Path – Poppy Field loop from Av. Central - Cinco, a 21.6 miles (34.82 km) trail leading through valleys and tree-lined areas, often completed in about 2 hours 46 minutes. Mountain biking around Nuevo Baztán is defined by its valleys, diverse forests, and streams, with a network of routes offering options for different ability levels. The routes in Nuevo Baztán are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.47 stars from over 19 reviews. More than 145 mountain bikers have used komoot to explore Nuevo Baztán's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many mountain bike trails are there in Nuevo Baztán?
A: There are over 30 mountain bike trails around Nuevo Baztán, offering a wide range of options for different skill levels and preferences. The komoot community has explored more than 30 routes in the area.

Q: Are there mountain bike trails for beginners in Nuevo Baztán?
A: Yes, Nuevo Baztán offers a few easier trails suitable for beginners. There are 2 easy routes available, providing a gentle introduction to mountain biking in the region's diverse landscapes.

Q: What about more challenging mountain bike routes for experienced riders?
A: For experienced mountain bikers seeking a challenge, there is 1 difficult trail in Nuevo Baztán. Additionally, there are 28 moderate trails that offer engaging rides through varied terrain, including valleys, streams, and Mediterranean flora.

Q: Are there any circular mountain bike trails in Nuevo Baztán?
A: Yes, many of the mountain bike trails in Nuevo Baztán are circular. For example, you can try &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1316425724/pezuela-de-las-torres-circular-desde-nuevo-baztan" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Pezuela de las Torres — circular desde Nuevo Baztán&lt;/a&gt;, a 22-mile route, or the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/6913145" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Negrín Railway Path – Poppy Field loop from Av. Central - Cinco&lt;/a&gt;, which is 21.6 miles long.

Q: What kind of natural features and landscapes can I expect to see while mountain biking in Nuevo Baztán?
A: The region is characterized by diverse Mediterranean flora, including extensive areas of holm oaks, gall oaks, olive groves, and almond trees. You'll ride through the Valle del Tajuña and Arroyo Vega, which offer scenic paths. Keep an eye out for notable trees and the Valmores Fountain along the Valmores Path.

Q: Are there any interesting landmarks or attractions along the mountain bike trails?
A: Yes, the area combines natural beauty with cultural heritage. You might encounter the historic &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3045704" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Goyeneche Palace of Nuevo Baztán&lt;/a&gt;, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3501590" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Valmores Fountain&lt;/a&gt;, or the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/1737135" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;La Oliva fountain&lt;/a&gt;. The trails also pass through natural highlights like the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/7267547" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Valhondo Valley&lt;/a&gt; and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/7084139" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Geology of the Tajuña Valley Landscape&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: What is the best time of year to go mountain biking in Nuevo Baztán?
A: Nuevo Baztán's Mediterranean climate generally makes it suitable for mountain biking for much of the year. Spring and autumn offer pleasant temperatures and vibrant landscapes. Summers can be hot, so early morning or late afternoon rides are advisable, while winters are mild but can have cooler, wetter days.

Q: Is there parking available near the mountain bike trails in Nuevo Baztán?
A: While specific parking areas for each trail are not always explicitly marked, Nuevo Baztán is a town with various access points. Many routes start from or pass through areas where street parking or small public parking lots may be available, particularly near the town center or residential areas like Eurovillas-Las Villas.

Q: What do other mountain bikers enjoy most about mountain biking in Nuevo Baztán?
A: The mountain bike trails around Nuevo Baztán are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 4.47 stars from over 19 reviews. Riders often praise the diverse terrain, the scenic views of holm oaks and olive groves, and the extensive network of trails that cater to various skill levels.

Q: Are there any cafes or amenities near the mountain bike trails?
A: Nuevo Baztán, being a historic town, offers amenities such as cafes and restaurants where you can refuel before or after your ride. The town center, particularly around the Goyeneche Palace, is a good place to find facilities. Some routes might pass through or near smaller villages with local establishments.

Q: Can I combine mountain biking with cultural exploration in Nuevo Baztán?
A: Absolutely. Nuevo Baztán is known for its unique Baroque urban design, centered around the Goyeneche Palace and the Church of San Francisco Javier. Many trails are easily accessible from the town, allowing you to combine your ride with a visit to these historical sites and experience the rich cultural backdrop of the region.
tips: Nuevo Baztán is 40 minutes from Madrid and has entered the list of "The Most Beautiful Towns in Spain". The Goyeneche palace is in a very beautiful area in front of a square full of trees. Goyeneche's palace and residence forms a façade with the Church, forming the central nucleus of this monument. There is a tourist office where they give you a map and QR codes with a tour to do around the town and all the information about those points.
If you have gone up to the urbanization to look out over the plain from the forest watchtower, when you return, do not run because the views of Pezuela de las Torres are beautiful.
Strong climb, well worth a good photo

waypoints.name: View of Pezuela de las Torres
